name: news-stock-chrome-extension-backend
description: Local Express server running Zhanla-based LLM stock analysis agent for Chrome Extension

scripts.eval: npx zhanla-sdk-ts run backend/agent.ts:"News Impact Pipeline" --eval backend/eval.ts:"Stock Impact Pipeline Eval"
scripts.eval:python: /Users/benjaminchou/Library/Python/3.11/bin/zhanla run backend/agent.ts:"News Impact Pipeline" --dataset backend/dataset.json --eval backend/eval.ts:"Stock Impact Pipeline Eval" --dry-run --yes
